core_concept: 神秘組織對抗超自然存在，維護人類世界的正常秩序
composition_hint: 以對比強烈的光影和視覺層次展現神秘與威嚴
original_excerpt:
Mankind in its present state has been around for a quarter of a million years, yet only a small fraction of that has been of any significance.
So, what did we do for nearly 250,000 years? We huddled in caves and around small fires, fearful of the things that we didn't understand. It was more than explaining why the sun came up, it was the mystery of enormous birds with heads of men and rocks that came to life. So we called them "gods" and "demons", begged them to spare us, and prayed for salvati
